articles.title: Meta and YouTube found liable in landmark social media addiction trial
articles.summary: A woman has been awarded $3m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

articles.summary: The landmark resolution calls for an apology and contributions to a reparations fund, without specifying an amount.
